title: daphne canescens
intro: Daphne canescens, also known as the hoary daphne or alpine daphne, is a species of flowering plant in the family Thymelaeaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues. Daphne canescens is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its safety and effectiveness have not been extensively scientifically studied.
